title: EQ - Reset EQ and Save EQ becomes active only after moving slider
scenario: Reset EQ and Save EQ buttons remain disabled until a slider is moved, instead of becoming active immediately upon interacting with any EQ slider in Custom EQ mode.
steps: Observe the state of the 'Reset EQ' and 'Save EQ' buttons.
Observe the state of the 'Reset EQ' and 'Save EQ' buttons after moving the slider.
expected: The 'Reset EQ' and 'Save EQ' buttons should become active (not greyed out) immediately when the user interacts with any EQ slider in Custom EQ mode.
